examples: He was also regarded as a great patriot because not only did his cartoons praise America, but, during World War II, his studios made training films for American soldiers.
He regards himself as a patriot.
Of or relating to a chauvinistic patriot.
An American patriot knows that the Bill of Rights is not a suicide pact.
There were those who continued to admire him as a patriot, a Serb nationalist.
